factors.summary: Demand is accelerating across all regions.

evidence.text: Sales increased in the three months ended December 31, 2017 , in the United States, Canada, EMEA, Asia Pacific, and Latin America.
evidence.subsection: Three Months Ended December 31, 2017 , Compared to Three Months Ended December 31, 2016

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: Demand is accelerating across all regions, indicating strong growth.

evidence.text: Organic sales growth was broad-based across all regions for the three months ended December 31, 2017 .

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Organic revenue growth is accelerating, showing improvement.

factors.summary: End markets are growing fastest in heavy industries and consumer sectors.

evidence.text: Strength in heavy industries, partially offset by weakness in consumer and automotive industries.
evidence.subsection: Three Months Ended December 31, 2017 , Compared to Three Months Ended December 31, 2016

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Mixed signals with strength in some industries offset by weakness in others.

evidence.text: The company repurchased approximately 1.1 million shares of its common stock under its share repurchase program in the first three months of 2018.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Share repurchases indicate high management confidence.

evidence.text: We expect to repurchase $1.2 billion of our common stock during fiscal year 2018.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Share repurchase plans show prioritization of shareholder returns.

factors.summary: Free cash flow generation is improving.

evidence.text: Free cash flow was $178.6 million for the three months ended December 31, 2017 , compared to $271.4 million for the three months ended December 31, 2016 .

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Free cash flow decreased year-over-year, indicating a decline.
